message:
docs(readme): document additional CLI flags, utility subcommands, and provider aliases

Add documentation for high-leverage CLI flags (--provider, --mode,
--extension-policy, --repair-policy, --session-durability,
--list-providers), utility subcommands (update-index, search, info,
doctor, migrate), and expand the provider/model configuration section
with environment variable references and multi-provider examples.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
